sum: This mod adds a romance for female PJs of good or neutral alignment (not chaotic neutral) or druidesses.
no: Tender love and care for one silent, brooding type. The Mod Corthala Romantique adds a romance for Valygar for female PCs (no short races) of good or neutral alignment (no chaotic neutral) or female druids. To proceed with the romance, the reputation has to be above 13. The mod also adds friendship talks for the SoA part of the game for PCs that do not fulfill the romance criteria. For ToB, all...

co.n: Install Leonora Content: A Guard for the Sphere
co.tp2n: Install Leonora Content: A Guard for the Sphere
